articles.title: ASUS Republic of Gamers Announces ROG NUC 16 - ASUS Pressroom
articles.description: ROG NUC 16: ASUS unveils a compact gaming PC for gamers and creators. Features Intel Core Ultra, NVIDIA RTX 5080 Laptop GPU, AI-enhanced graphics, QuietFlow cooling, and versatile dual-orientation design. Subscribe to ASUS Pressroom for the latest tech update…

articles.title: Big Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch sale live with games as low as $15 - Nintendo Everything
articles.description: A big sale has just started for Nintendo Switch 1 and 2 that discounts some notable games to as low as $15 - here's the full list.

articles.title: A new tool just combined ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and more — lifetime access is on sale for $70 - Mashable
articles.description: A lifetime subscription with access to 20+ AI models usually costs $619

articles.title: Scientists Uncover an “Alien” Metal Hidden in a 3,000-Year-Old Year-Old Treasure Stash - The Daily Galaxy
articles.description: A Spanish museum guarded a 3,000-year-old secret. Two corroded objects in Europe's richest Bronze Age gold hoard were made from metal that fell from the sky.

articles.title: Microsoft Confirms Active 0-Day Exploit—Check Emergency Mitigation Now - Forbes
articles.description: Microsoft Exchange users are urged to mitigate a zero-day vulnerability that CISA has confirmed is under active exploitation.

articles.title: I removed Samsung's unremovable apps, and now my phone zips along - Android Police
articles.description: Half an hour with ADB and my Samsung finally runs clean
